Elegant Accommodation: Dar Soufian in Ouarzazate offers a recently renovated riad with a terrace, bar, and free WiFi. Guests enjoy air-conditioning, private bathrooms, and balconies with garden or mountain views.
Comfortable Amenities: The property features a coffee shop, outdoor seating area, picnic spots, and family rooms. Additional services include a paid shuttle, 24-hour front desk, daily housekeeping, and a tour desk.
Delicious Breakfast: A continental, vegetarian, halal, and gluten-free breakfast is served with local specialities, juice, and fruits.
Prime Location: Located 4 km from Ouarzazate airport, the riad is 42 km from Kasbah Amridil and 34 km from Ksar Ait-Ben-Haddou.

Comfortable Accommodations: Riad Parfums de Ouarzazate in Ouarzazate offers family rooms with private bathrooms, air-conditioning, and free WiFi. Each room includes a sofa bed, TV, and wardrobe.
Exceptional Facilities: Guests can relax on the sun terrace, enjoy the open-air bath, and swim in the seasonal outdoor pool. The property features a lounge, outdoor fireplace, and outdoor seating area.
Dining Experience: The family-friendly restaurant serves Moroccan cuisine with local specialities, fresh pastries, and a variety of breakfast options including continental, vegetarian, halal, and gluten-free.
Prime Location: Located a few steps from Ouarzazate airport, the guest house is near attractions such as Kasbah Amridil (39 km) and Ksar Ait-Ben-Haddou (32 km).
